jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Jetking
jsonLd.description:
Jetking, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jetking:
Jetking is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jetking!
